name: Tiemco Ltd.
summary: Tiemco Ltd. plans, develops, manufactures, imports, exports, and sells fishing tackle and outdoor products in Japan and internationally. Its fishing product includes fly hooks, fly tying tools and materials, fly rods and reels, leaders and tippet, and accessories; and bass rods and lures, saltwater rods and lures, trout rods and lures, and accessories. The company offers polarized sunglasses; and jackets, vests and packs, waders and gaiters, wading shoes, rain wear, shirts, cut and sewn products, pants, tights and socks, hats and caps, gloves, inflatable PFDs, bags and luggage, and accessories. It also operates a fly fishing school for saltwater. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
